panel.default_description: Click the button below — or pick a category — and a private channel will be created for you.
panel.select_placeholder: Select a category to open a ticket…
panel.no_categories: Add at least one category with `/category add` first.
panel.panel_full: Panels can hold a maximum of 25 categories.

form.max_reached: A panel can have at most 5 form questions.
form.list_empty: No form questions configured for this panel.

create.default_question_label: Why are you opening this ticket?
create.cooldown: ⏳ Please wait **{seconds}s** before opening another ticket.
create.too_many_open: You already have **{count}** open tickets. Close one first.
create.outside_hours: 🕐 Support is currently offline. We open again at **{next} UTC**.
create.welcome_default: Hi {user}, support will be with you shortly.

actions.already_claimed: This ticket is already claimed by {user}.
actions.closing_in: This channel will be deleted in {seconds}s.
actions.user_added: {user} has been added to this ticket.
actions.user_removed: {user} has been removed from this ticket.
actions.not_a_ticket: This is not a ticket channel.

multi.max_reached: A multi-panel can hold at most 5 sub-panels.
